stench.short_effect: Has a 10% chance of making target Pokemon flinch with each hit.

drizzle.short_effect: Summons rain that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

speed-boost.short_effect: Raises Speed one stage after each turn.

sturdy.short_effect: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead.  Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.

damp.short_effect: Prevents self destruct, explosion, and aftermath from working while the Pokemon is in battle.

sand-veil.short_effect: Increases evasion to 1.25x during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.

static.short_effect: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing attacking Pokemon on contact.

volt-absorb.short_effect: Absorbs electric moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

water-absorb.short_effect: Absorbs water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

oblivious.short_effect: Prevents infatuation and protects against captivate.

cloud-nine.short_effect: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.

color-change.short_effect: Changes type to match when hit by a damaging move.

flash-fire.short_effect: Protects against fire moves.  Once one has been blocked, the Pokemon's own Fire moves inflict 1.5x damage until it leaves battle.

shield-dust.short_effect: Protects against incoming moves' extra effects.

suction-cups.short_effect: Prevents being forced out of battle by other Pokemon's moves.

intimidate.short_effect: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.

shadow-tag.short_effect: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.

rough-skin.short_effect: Damages attacking Pokemon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.

wonder-guard.short_effect: Protects against damaging moves that are not super effective.

effect-spore.short_effect: Has a 30% chance of inflicting either paralysis, poison, or sleep on attacking Pokemon on contact.

synchronize.short_effect: Copies burns, paralysis, and poison received onto the Pokemon that inflicted them.

clear-body.short_effect: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokemon.

natural-cure.short_effect: Cures any major status ailment upon switching out.

lightning-rod.short_effect: Redirects single-target electric moves to this Pokemon where possible.  Absorbs Electric moves, raising Special Attack one stage.

serene-grace.short_effect: Doubles the chance of moves' extra effects occurring.

trace.short_effect: Copies an opponent's ability upon entering battle.

poison-point.short_effect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokemon on contact.

magnet-pull.short_effect: Prevents steel opponents from fleeing or switching out.

rain-dish.short_effect: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during rain.

sand-stream.short_effect: Summons a sandstorm that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

pressure.short_effect: Increases the PP cost of moves targeting the Pokemon by one.

thick-fat.short_effect: Halves damage from fire and ice moves.

early-bird.short_effect: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.

flame-body.short_effect: Has a 30% chance of burning attacking Pokemon on contact.

run-away.short_effect: Ensures success fleeing from wild battles.

hyper-cutter.short_effect: Prevents Attack from being lowered by other Pokemon.

pickup.short_effect: Picks up other Pokemon's used and Flung held items.  May also pick up an item after battle.

hustle.short_effect: Strengthens physical moves to inflict 1.5x damage, but decreases their accuracy to 0.8x.

cute-charm.short_effect: Has a 30% chance of infatuating attacking Pokemon on contact.

plus.short_effect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5x when a friendly Pokemon has plus or minus.

minus.short_effect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5x when a friendly Pokemon has plus or minus.

forecast.short_effect: Changes Castform's type and form to match the weather.

sticky-hold.short_effect: Prevents a held item from being removed by other Pokemon.

shed-skin.short_effect: Has a 33% chance of curing any major status ailment after each turn.

guts.short_effect: Increases Attack to 1.5x with a major status ailment.

marvel-scale.short_effect: Increases Defense to 1.5x with a major status ailment.

liquid-ooze.short_effect: Damages opponents using leeching moves for as much as they would heal.

overgrow.short_effect: Strengthens grass moves to inflict 1.5x damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

blaze.short_effect: Strengthens fire moves to inflict 1.5x damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

torrent.short_effect: Strengthens water moves to inflict 1.5x damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

swarm.short_effect: Strengthens bug moves to inflict 1.5x damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

drought.short_effect: Summons strong sunlight that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

arena-trap.short_effect: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.  Eluded by flying-types and Pokemon in the air.

white-smoke.short_effect: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokemon.

air-lock.short_effect: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.

motor-drive.short_effect: Absorbs electric moves, raising Speed one stage.

rivalry.short_effect: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25x against Pokemon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75x against the opposite gender.

steadfast.short_effect: Raises Speed one stage upon flinching.

snow-cloak.short_effect: Increases evasion to 1.25x during hail.  Protects against hail damage.

gluttony.short_effect: Makes the Pokemon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.

anger-point.short_effect: Raises Attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.

unburden.short_effect: Doubles Speed upon using or losing a held item.

heatproof.short_effect: Halves damage from fire moves and burns.

simple.short_effect: Doubles the Pokemon's stat modifiers.  These doubled modifiers are still capped at -6 or 6 stages.

dry-skin.short_effect: Causes 1/8 max HP in damage each turn during strong sunlight, but heals for 1/8 max HP during rain.  Increases damage from fire moves to 1.25x, but absorbs water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

download.short_effect: Raises the attack stat corresponding to the opponents' weaker defense one stage upon entering battle.

iron-fist.short_effect: Strengthens punch-based moves to 1.2x their power.

poison-heal.short_effect: Heals for 1/8 max HP after each turn when poisoned in place of damage.

adaptability.short_effect: Increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5x to 2x.

skill-link.short_effect: Extends two-to-five-hit moves and triple kick to their full length every time.

hydration.short_effect: Cures any major status ailment after each turn during rain.

solar-power.short_effect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5x but costs 1/8 max HP after each turn during strong sunlight.

quick-feet.short_effect: Increases Speed to 1.5x with a major status ailment.

normalize.short_effect: Makes the Pokemon's moves all act normal-type.

sniper.short_effect: Strengthens critical hits to inflict 3x damage rather than 2x.

magic-guard.short_effect: Protects against damage not directly caused by a move.

no-guard.short_effect: Ensures all moves used by and against the Pokemon hit.

stall.short_effect: Makes the Pokemon move last within its move's priority bracket.

technician.short_effect: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5x their power.

leaf-guard.short_effect: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.

klutz.short_effect: Prevents the Pokemon from using its held item in battle.

mold-breaker.short_effect: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent a move.

super-luck.short_effect: Raises moves' critical hit rates one stage.

aftermath.short_effect: Damages the attacker for 1/4 its max HP when knocked out by a contact move.

anticipation.short_effect: Notifies upon entering battle if an opponent has a super-effective move, Self-Destruct, Explosion, or a one-hit KO move.

forewarn.short_effect: Reveals the opponents' strongest move upon entering battle.

unaware.short_effect: Ignores other Pokemon's stat modifiers for damage and accuracy calculation.

tinted-lens.short_effect: Doubles damage inflicted with not-very-effective moves.

filter.short_effect: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.

slow-start.short_effect: Halves Attack and Speed for five turns upon entering battle.

scrappy.short_effect: Lets the Pokemon's Normal- and Fighting-type moves hit Ghost Pokemon.

storm-drain.short_effect: Redirects single-target water moves to this Pokemon where possible.  Absorbs Water moves, raising Special Attack one stage.

ice-body.short_effect: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during hail.  Protects against hail damage.

solid-rock.short_effect: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.

snow-warning.short_effect: Summons hail that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

honey-gather.short_effect: The Pokemon may pick up honey after battle.

frisk.short_effect: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.

reckless.short_effect: Strengthens recoil moves to 1.2x their power.

multitype.short_effect: Changes arceus's type and form to match its held Plate.

flower-gift.short_effect: Raises Attack and Special Defense to 1.5x during strong sunlight.

bad-dreams.short_effect: Damages sleeping opponents for 1/8 their max HP after each turn.

pickpocket.short_effect: Steals attacking Pokemon's held items on contact.

sheer-force.short_effect: Strengthens moves with extra effects to 1.3x their power, but prevents their extra effects.

unnerve.short_effect: Prevents opposing Pokemon from eating held Berries.

defiant.short_effect: Raises Attack two stages upon having any stat lowered.

defeatist.short_effect: Halves Attack and Special Attack at 50% max HP or less.

cursed-body.short_effect: Has a 30% chance of disabling a move that hits the Pokemon.

healer.short_effect: Has a 30% chance of curing each adjacent ally of any major status ailment after each turn.

friend-guard.short_effect: Decreases all direct damage taken by friendly Pokemon to 0.75x.

weak-armor.short_effect: Lowers Defense one stage and raises Speed one stage when hit by a physical move.

multiscale.short_effect: Halves damage taken from full HP.

toxic-boost.short_effect: Boosts physical move power to 1.5x while poisoned.

flare-boost.short_effect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5x when burned.

harvest.short_effect: Has a 50% chance of restoring a used Berry after each turn if the Pokemon has held no items in the meantime.

telepathy.short_effect: Protects against friendly Pokemon's damaging moves.

moody.short_effect: Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.

poison-touch.short_effect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning the target upon contact.

regenerator.short_effect: Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.

sand-rush.short_effect: Doubles Speed during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.

wonder-skin.short_effect: Lowers incoming non-damaging moves' base accuracy to exactly 50%.

analytic.short_effect: Boosts move power to 1.3x when moving last.

illusion.short_effect: Takes the appearance of the last conscious party Pokemon upon being sent out until hit by a damaging move.

infiltrator.short_effect: Bypasses light screen, reflect, and safeguard.

mummy.short_effect: Changes attacking Pokemon's abilities to Mummy on contact.

moxie.short_effect: Raises Attack one stage upon KOing a Pokemon.

justified.short_effect: Raises Attack one stage upon taking damage from a dark move.

rattled.short_effect: Raises Speed one stage upon being hit by a dark, ghost, or bug move.

magic-bounce.short_effect: Reflects most non-damaging moves back at their user.

sap-sipper.short_effect: Absorbs grass moves, raising Attack one stage.

prankster.short_effect: Raises non-damaging moves' priority by one stage.

sand-force.short_effect: Strengthens rock, ground, and steel moves to 1.3x their power during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.

iron-barbs.short_effect: Damages attacking Pokemon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.

zen-mode.short_effect: Changes darmanitan's form after each turn depending on its HP: Zen Mode below 50% max HP, and Standard Mode otherwise.

victory-star.short_effect: Increases moves' accuracy to 1.1x for friendly Pokemon.

turboblaze.short_effect: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent moves.

teravolt.short_effect: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent moves.
